type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
A worn valve stem on the propylene system resulted in a leak that was monitored and minimized until it could be  replaced during the planned maintenance shutdown in the fall of 2013.
A deficiency in the design of an upgraded piping system resulted in a discharge of Propylene from the system – once discovered, the design was upgraded and field changes made which eliminated the discharge.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Higher air emissions from loading operations in 2016.
All water samples collected and analyzed in 2016 were below the lab detection limit except two which resulted in higher water releases. Please note that the elevated concentration of toluene was determined from  equipment malfunctioning and therefore considered to be overestimated.

type.en: Additional information on detection limits, concentration, or local natural concentrations
type.fr: Renseignements supplémentaires sur les limites de détection, sur la concentration ou sur les concentration naturelles locales

comments.comment: Out of fifty three (53) samples collected and analyzed throughout 2016, the concentration of toluene in only two samples were reported above the laboratory detection limit (DL). The elevated concentration of toluene was determined to be related to equipment malfunctioning and/or sample cross-contamination. No trace of toluene was detected in any of the prior or subsequent samples analyzed by the laboratory.
